title: LegalStories
description: ACL 2024 dataset and codebase for teaching legal doctrines through LLM-generated stories, with multi-question evaluation and expert-annotated subsets.
coverage: Core corpus includes 294 doctrines with average definition length 162.2 words (range 6-673).
license_notes: Repository includes an Apache-2.0 license file. Verify per-model API terms and downstream educational use requirements.
